leadText: The Energy Root (Japanese: ちからのねっこ Energy Root) is a type of medicine introduced in Generation II. It is a type of herbal medicine that restores a Pokémon's HP.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation II to VI [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag on a Pokémon, it heals the Pokémon by 200 HP but lowers its friendship . It is consumed after use. Generation VII onward [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag on a Pokémon, it heals the Pokémon by 120 HP but lowers its friendship . It is consumed after use.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description G S C Restores Pok é mon HP by 200. Bitter. R S E Colo XD A bitter root that restores HP by 200 points. FR LG A very bitter root. It restores the HP of one Pok é mon by 200 points. D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 A very bitter root. It restores the HP of one Pokémon by 200 points. X Y OR AS An extremely bitter medicinal root. When consumed, it restores 200 HP to an injured Pokémon. S M US UM P E An extremely bitter medicinal root. When consumed, it restores up to 120 HP to an injured Pokémon. Sw Sh BD SP LA An extremely bitter medicinal root. It can be used to restore 120 HP to a single Pokémon. S V ZA A very bitter medicinal root. It can be used to restore 120 HP to a Pokémon.
